rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DANIEL NUNEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay The Unlawful Detainer Proceeding And Or Motion To Consolidate The Unlawful Detainer Proceeding With The Probate Proceeding; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: Gloria Nunez's Motion to Stay the Unlawful Detainer Proceeding or to Consolidate the Unlawful Detainer Proceeding with the Probate Proceeding is denied as moot and duplicative in light of the orders entered by Department 501 in CUD-16-654604 on March 24, 2016 (denying the motion to consolidate and granting the stay) and April 11, 2016 (extending the stay). Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:30 p.m. Tuesday, April 19, 2016.
